description: Each phase agent emits a structured PhaseDecision JSON. The engine validates it and uses the agent's verdict, confidence, and evidence to decide whether to advance, rework, or fail — making EvaluateGates do real work instead of rubber-stamping. Currently gates always pass unconditionally (lifecycle_executor.rs:205-207). Full implementation plan at .claude/plans/twinkling-nibbling-mountain.md covering: core types, decision contract config, parsing from agent output, gate evaluation in lifecycle executor, service layer wiring, daemon scheduler integration, prompt template updates, default config, and tests.
title: Implement structured phase decision contracts for workflow engine
